nasb.text: Where no oxen are, the manger is clean, But much revenue comes by the strength of the ox.

esv.text: Where there are no oxen, the manger is clean, but abundant crops come by the strength of the ox.

cnv.text: 沒有耕牛，槽頭乾淨； 出產豐盛，卻是憑著牛的力量。

ccb.text: 没有耕牛槽头净， 五谷丰登需壮牛。

csbs.text: 没有耕牛，槽头空空； 藉着牛力，收成丰盛。
